(7) In this rule, “interested party” has the meaning given in section 1(10) of the Maintenance Enforcement Act 1991. ] ]

#### Enforcement E+W


32.11. —(1) [ F45 Subject to paragraph (2), Part 33 ] applies to an application for or with respect to the enforcement of a Scottish order or a Northern Irish order registered in the High Court [ F46 or the family court ] .


(2) The application may be made without notice to the person liable to make payments under the order.


Textual Amendments
